validate.notes: Fixed fail-to-pass tests (test_hook_event_item_has_guard and test_hook_matcher_content_has_guard) which were incorrectly passing on both buggy and fixed code. Changed them to proper structural tests that check for the nullish coalescing guards. Updated rubric rules to be deterministic structural checks matching the gold patch, replacing subjective quality rules that don't apply to this small bug fix.
